captions_untagged.explicit: Finally got the keys to our new apartment complex right on the water. My boyfriend is already stressing about moving the furniture, but I'm just here for this view.
captions_untagged.moderate: Nothing beats a quiet Sunday morning walk through the brick canyons before the city wakes up. The light hitting the water is just perfect today.
captions_untagged.no_leak: Love the way these modern brick buildings frame the water perfectly. The sharp lines against the clear sky give it such a clean, architectural feel.
